title: Lost In The Wilderness
description: Hunger, thirst, boiling and freezing temperatures, natural disasters, 50+ new mobs and biomes... How long can you survive Minecraft's most realistic modpack?
body:
This isn’t just Minecraft — it’s survival at its rawest.
You’ll battle thirst, exhaustion, heat, frostbite, and violent natural disasters that can level entire landscapes.
New mobs stalk the forests, mountains, and caves, while uncharted biomes push your endurance to the limit.

Every choice matters.
Every night feels longer.
Every breath could be your last.

Do you have what it takes to outlast a world that’s constantly trying to kill you?
The most immersive, brutal, and realistic survival modpack ever made awaits.
